---
title: "SNR Analysis Report"
author: "Taylor W. Uselman (Bearer Lab)"
date: "Original Date: 4/7/2025"
output:
  html_document: 
    toc: true
    number_sections: true
    toc_depth: 5
    code_folding: show
    theme: cerulean #spacelab yeti united cosmo | #prettydoc::html_pretty cayman tactile architect leonids hpstr
    highlight: tango
  pdf_document:
    df_print: kable
fontsize: 12pt
geometry: margin=0.25in
always_allow_html: yes
---

# Summary and Setup: 

This script generates plots for SNR analysis in "Quality Assurance Strategies for Brain State Characterization by MEMRI" by Uselman TW, Jacobs RE, and Bearer EL (2026).


```{R setup, include=FALSE}
# Format RMarkdown Parameters
knitr::opts_chunk$set(comment = NA, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, width = 100)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.align = "center", fig.height = 4, fig.width = 6)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(cache = TRUE) 
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE) # Code output is echoed/output immediately after the code in the .html file.

#######################
# Set Local Directory #
#######################
wdir = "SET-LOCAL-DIRECTORY"
#######################
setwd(wdir)
```


```{R}
# Data Processing
# citation()
libs = c("openxlsx","tidyverse","ggplot2","nlme","emmeans")
lL = length(libs)
vers = c("3.5.0","4.1.0","4.1.0","3.1.0","4.0.0") # minimum R required is 4.1.0
lV = length(vers)
minvers = numeric_version(max(package_version(vers)))
if (getRversion() < minvers) {stop(paste0("ERROR: minimum R version must be ",minvers))} 
for (i in 1:length(libs)) {
  if (lL != lV) {stop("be sure correct minvers are included libs")}
  if (!requireNamespace(libs[i], quietly = TRUE)) {install.packages(libs[i])}
}
```


```{R}
# Set up color pallete
ColPal = data.frame(
  ColorName = c("Blue","Vermillion","SkyBlue","Yellow"),
  Red = c(0,213,86,240)/255,
  Green = c(114,94,180,228)/255,
  Blue = c(178,0,223,66)/255
) %>% mutate(
  RGB = rgb(red=Red,green=Green,blue=Blue,alpha=1)
)
```

# Load and Process Raw Data

```{R}
filename <- "Fig2B_ROI_Data.xlsx"

dat_snr = read.xlsx(filename,
                    na.strings = NA,
                    sheet = "SNR_Data",
                    colNames = T)

dat_snr %>% str()

# FORMAT DATA FRAME
dat_snr <- dat_snr %>%
  mutate(
    MnII = factor(
      MnII,
      levels = c("Pre","Post")),
    ROI = factor(
      ROI,
      levels = c("Brain","Muscle","Noise")),
    ID = factor(ID)
  )

dat_snr %>% str()
summary(dat_snr)
```

## Plot Raw Data

### SNR

```{R}
p = ggplot(dat_snr %>% filter(ROI != "Noise"),
           aes(x = MnII, y=SNR, fill=ROI, label=as.factor(ID)))
p = p + geom_boxplot(position=position_dodge(0.5),
                     color="black",alpha=0.5,
                     width=0.5, outlier.shape = NA)
p = p + geom_text(fill=NA,color="black",size=6)
p = p + scale_fill_manual(values=ColPal$RGB)
p = p + facet_grid(. ~ ROI)
p = p + theme_bw()
p = p + labs(x="Mn(II)",y="SNR")
p = p + theme(plot.title = element_blank()
              , axis.title.x = element_blank()
              , axis.text.x = element_text(size=14,family="sans")
              , axis.title.y = element_text(size=16,face="bold",family="sans")
              , axis.text.y = element_text(size=14,family="sans")
              , strip.text = element_text(size=16,face="bold",family="sans")
              , strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey75")
              , legend.position = "none")
p
```

### CNR

```{R}
p = ggplot(dat_snr %>% filter(ROI != "Noise"),
           aes(x = MnII, y=CNR, fill=ROI, label=as.factor(ID)))
p = p + geom_boxplot(position=position_dodge(0.5),
                     color="black",alpha=0.5,
                     width=0.5, outlier.shape = NA)
p = p + geom_text(fill=NA,color="black",size=6)
p = p + scale_fill_manual(values=ColPal$RGB)
p = p + facet_grid(. ~ ROI)
p = p + theme_bw()
p = p + labs(x="Mn(II)",y="CNR")
p = p + theme(plot.title = element_blank()
              , axis.title.x = element_blank()
              , axis.text.x = element_text(size=14,family="sans")
              , axis.title.y = element_text(size=16,face="bold",family="sans")
              , axis.text.y = element_text(size=14,family="sans")
              , strip.text = element_text(size=16,face="bold",family="sans")
              , strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey75")
              , legend.position = "none")
p
```

# Summarize Data and Calculcate SNR/CNR

```{R}
dat_snr_sum <- dat_snr %>%
  group_by(
    ROI,
    MnII
  ) %>%
  reframe(
    Avg.SNR = mean(SNR),
    SD.SNR = sd(SNR),
    SE.SNR  = SD.SNR / sqrt(n()),
    COV.SNR = SD.SNR / Avg.SNR,
    Avg.CNR = mean(CNR),
    SD.CNR = sd(CNR),
    SE.CNR  = SD.CNR / sqrt(n()),
    COV.CNR = SD.CNR / Avg.CNR
  ) %>%
  ungroup() 

str(dat_snr_sum)
summary(dat_snr_sum)

dat_snr_sum
```

## Plot Summary SNR/CNR Data

### SNR

```{R}
p = ggplot(dat_snr_sum %>% filter(ROI != "Noise"),
           aes(x = MnII, y=Avg.SNR, color=ROI))
p = p + geom_point(position=position_dodge(0.5), alpha=1, size=5)
p = p + geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = Avg.SNR-SE.SNR, ymax = Avg.SNR+SE.SNR, ),
                      position=position_dodge(0.5), alpha=1, linewidth=1, width=0.5)
p = p + scale_color_manual(values=ColPal$RGB)
p = p + theme_classic()
p = p + facet_grid(. ~ ROI)
p = p + labs(x="Mn(II)",y="SNR")
p = p + theme(plot.title = element_blank()
              , axis.title.x = element_text(size=16,face="bold",family="sans")
              , axis.text.x = element_text(size=14,family="sans")
              , axis.title.y = element_text(size=16,face="bold",family="sans")
              , axis.text.y = element_text(size=14,family="sans")
              , strip.text = element_text(size=16,face="bold",family="sans")
              , strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey75")
              , legend.position = "none")
p
```

```{R, fig.height=1.2, fig.width=1.6}
# For Figure 2B
p = ggplot(dat_snr_sum %>% filter(ROI != "Noise"),
           aes(x = MnII, y=Avg.SNR, color=ROI))
p = p + geom_point(position=position_dodge(0.5), alpha=1, size=1)
p = p + geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = Avg.SNR-SE.SNR, ymax = Avg.SNR+SE.SNR),
                      position=position_dodge(0.5), alpha=1, linewidth=0.8, width=0.5)
p = p + scale_color_manual(values=ColPal$RGB)
p = p + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(15,35), breaks = seq(15,35,5),
                           expand = c(0,0,0,0))
p = p + theme_classic()
p = p + facet_grid(. ~ ROI)
p = p + labs(x="Mn(II)",y="SNR")
p = p + theme(plot.title = element_blank()
              , axis.title.x = element_blank()
              , axis.text.x = element_text(size=8,family="sans",angle=70,hjust=0,vjust=0)
              , axis.title.y = element_text(size=9,face="bold",family="sans")
              , axis.text.y = element_text(size=7,family="sans")
              , panel.spacing.x = unit(0.05, "lines")
              , strip.text = element_blank()
              , strip.background = element_blank()
              , legend.position = "none")
# p
ggsave(filename="./Fig2_B2_SNR.tiff"
       ,plot=p
       ,device="tiff"
       ,path=paste0(wdir)
       ,width=1.2,height=1.2,units="in",dpi=300)
```

### CNR

```{R}
p = ggplot(dat_snr_sum %>% filter(ROI != "Noise"),
           aes(x = MnII, y=Avg.CNR, color=ROI))
p = p + geom_point(position=position_dodge(0.5), alpha=1, size=5)
p = p + geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = Avg.CNR-SE.CNR, ymax = Avg.CNR+SE.CNR),
                      position=position_dodge(0.5), alpha=1, linewidth=1, width=0.5)
p = p + scale_color_manual(values=ColPal$RGB)
p = p + theme_classic()
p = p + facet_grid(. ~ ROI)
p = p + labs(x="Mn(II)",y="SNR")
p = p + theme(plot.title = element_blank()
              , axis.title.x = element_text(size=16,face="bold",family="sans")
              , axis.text.x = element_text(size=14,family="sans")
              , axis.title.y = element_text(size=16,face="bold",family="sans")
              , axis.text.y = element_text(size=14,family="sans")
              , strip.text = element_text(size=16,face="bold",family="sans")
              , strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey75")
              , legend.position = "none")
p
```

```{R, fig.height=1.2, fig.width=1.6}
# For Figure 2B
p = ggplot(dat_snr_sum %>% filter(ROI != "Noise"),
           aes(x = MnII, y=Avg.CNR, color=ROI))
p = p + geom_point(position=position_dodge(0.5), alpha=1, size=1)
p = p + geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = Avg.CNR-SE.CNR, ymax = Avg.CNR+SE.CNR),
                      position=position_dodge(0.5), alpha=1, linewidth=0.8, width=0.5)
p = p + scale_color_manual(values=ColPal$RGB)
p = p + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(2,5.5), breaks = seq(2,5,1),
                           expand = c(0,0,0,0))
p = p + theme_classic()
p = p + facet_grid(. ~ ROI)
p = p + labs(x="Mn(II)",y="CNR")
p = p + theme(plot.title = element_blank()
              , axis.title.x = element_blank()
              , axis.text.x = element_text(size=8,family="sans",angle=70,hjust=0,vjust=0)
              , axis.title.y = element_text(size=9,face="bold",family="sans")
              , axis.text.y = element_text(size=7,family="sans")
              , panel.spacing.x = unit(0.05, "lines")
              , strip.text = element_blank()
              , strip.background = element_blank()
              , legend.position = "none")
# p
ggsave(filename="./Fig2_B3_CNR.tiff"
       ,plot=p
       ,device="tiff"
       ,path=paste0(wdir)
       ,width=1.2,height=1.2,units="in",dpi=300)
```


```{R}
lm.SNR <- lme(SNR ~ MnII * ROI, random=(~1|ID), data=dat_snr)
# summary(lm.SNR)

con.SNR = emmeans(lm.SNR, specs = "MnII", by = c("ROI"))
con.SNR %>% pairs()

lm.CNR <- lme(CNR ~ MnII * ROI, random=(~1|ID), data=dat_snr)
# summary(lm.CNR)
con.CNR = emmeans(lm.CNR, specs = "MnII", by = c("ROI"))
con.CNR %>% pairs()
```


```{R}
# For Figure 2B
dat_snr_sum2 = dat_snr_sum %>% 
  filter(ROI == "Brain") %>% 
  group_by(MnII) %>% 
  reframe(COV.SNR = mean(COV.SNR) %>% round(.,2),
          COV.CNR = mean(COV.CNR) %>% round(.,2))
dat_snr_sum3 = data.frame(
  MnII = rep(dat_snr_sum2$MnII,2),
  Measure = factor(c(rep("SNR",2),rep("CNR",2)),levels=c("SNR","CNR")),
  COV = c(dat_snr_sum2$COV.SNR,dat_snr_sum2$COV.CNR)
)

p = ggplot(dat_snr_sum3,
           aes(x = Measure, y=COV, fill=MnII, color=MnII))
p = p + geom_hline(yintercept=1,linetype="dashed", color="grey75",linewidth=2)
p = p + geom_bar(stat="identity", alpha=1,color=NA,
                 position=position_dodge(0.8),width=0.75, linewidth=1)
p = p + scale_fill_manual(values=ColPal$RGB[c(1,3)])
p = p + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,2), breaks = seq(0,1.5,0.5),
                           expand = c(0,0,0,0))
p = p + theme_classic()
p = p + facet_grid(. ~ MnII)
p = p + labs(x="",y="COV",title="Inter-subject Variance of Brain SNR and CNR")
p = p + theme(plot.title = element_text(size=18,family="sans",face="bold",hjust=0.5)
              , axis.title.x = element_blank()
              , axis.text.x = element_text(size=14,family="sans",angle=70,hjust=0,vjust=0)
              , axis.title.y = element_text(size=16,face="bold",family="sans")
              , axis.text.y = element_text(size=14,family="sans")
              , legend.title = element_text(size=16,face="bold",family="sans")
              , legend.text = element_text(size=14,family="sans")
              , panel.spacing.x = unit(0.05, "lines")
              , strip.text = element_blank()
              , strip.background = element_blank()
              )
p
```

```{R, fig.height=1.2, fig.width=1.6}
p = ggplot(dat_snr_sum3,
           aes(x = Measure, y=COV, fill=MnII, color=MnII))
p = p + geom_hline(yintercept=1,linetype="dashed", color="grey75")
p = p + geom_bar(stat="identity", alpha=1,color=NA,
                 position=position_dodge(0.8),width=0.75, linewidth=0.25)
p = p + scale_fill_manual(values=ColPal$RGB[c(1,3)])
p = p + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,2), breaks = seq(0,1.5,0.5),
                           expand = c(0,0,0,0))
p = p + theme_classic()
p = p + facet_grid(. ~ MnII)
p = p + labs(x="",y="COV")
p = p + theme(plot.title = element_blank()
              , axis.title.x = element_blank()
              , axis.text.x = element_text(size=8,family="sans",angle=70,hjust=0,vjust=0)
              , axis.title.y = element_text(size=9,face="bold",family="sans")
              , axis.text.y = element_text(size=7,family="sans")
              , panel.spacing.x = unit(0.05, "lines")
              , strip.text = element_blank()
              , strip.background = element_blank()
              , legend.position = "none")
# p
ggsave(filename="./Fig2_B4_COV_SNR.tiff"
       ,plot=p
       ,device="tiff"
       ,path=paste0(wdir)
       ,width=1.2,height=1.2,units="in",dpi=300)
```
